description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade. The exterior combines smooth white and gray wall panels with vertical wooden slats that add warmth and texture. The house includes a prominent balcony or terrace area on the upper floor, enclosed by glass railings, and a recessed entryway below. The structure is geometric, with clean lines and a boxy form, and the use of wood accents breaks up the otherwise stark surfaces. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and more solid wall space. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and wood-accented facades, featuring a balcony and minimalist geometric design.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing large glass windows, wood slats, balcony, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the flat roof, glass balcony railing, and extensive window coverage on the front.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, solid wall surfaces, and wood accent running vertically.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the balcony area, glass railing, and the boxy structure of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with wood accent, no steps, and a minimalist overhang
